title: taraxacum pseudohirtellum
intro: Taraxacum pseudohirtellum, also known as the lesser hawk's beard or small dandelion, is a plant species in the dandelion genus. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help soothe digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum pseudohirtellum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Taraxacum pseudohirtellum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
